name: Internet Connectivity
description: This layer shows computer ownership and type of internet subscription. This is shown by tract, county, and state boundaries. This service is updated annually to contain the most currently released American Community Survey (ACS) 5-year data, and contains estimates and margins of error. There are also additional calculated attributes related to this topic, which can be mapped or used within analysis.  <div><br /></div><div>This layer is symbolized to show the percentage of households with no internet connection. To see the full list of attributes available in this service, go to the &quot;Data&quot; tab, and choose &quot;Fields&quot; at the top right. <div><br /></div><div><div><b>Current Vintage</b>: <span style="font-family:&quot;Avenir Next W01&quot;, &quot;Avenir Next W00&quot;, &quot;Avenir Next&quot;, Avenir, &quot;Helvetica Neue&quot;, sans-serif; font-size:16px;">2019-2023</span></div><div><b>ACS Table(s)</b>: B28001, B28002 (Not all lines of ACS table B28002 are available in this feature layer)</div><div><b>Data downloaded from</b>: <a>Census Bureau's API for American Community Survey</a> </div><div><b><br /></b></div><div><b>The United States Census Bureau's American Community Survey (ACS):</b></div><div><ul><li><a>About the Survey</a><br /></li><li><a>Geography &amp; ACS</a><br /></li><li><a>Technical Documentation</a><br /></li><li><a>News &amp; Updates</a><br /></li></ul><div>This ready-to-use layer can be used within ArcGIS Pro, ArcGIS Online, its configurable apps, dashboards, Story Maps, custom apps, and mobile apps. Data can also be exported for offline workflows. For more information about ACS layers, visit the <a>FAQ</a>. Please cite the Census and ACS when using this data.</div></div><div><br /></div><div><div><b>Data Note from the Census:</b><br /></div><div>Data are based on a sample and are subject to sampling variability. The degree of uncertainty for an estimate arising from sampling variability is represented through the use of a margin of error. The value shown here is the 90 percent margin of error. The margin of error can be interpreted as providing a 90 percent probability that the interval defined by the estimate minus the margin of error and the estimate plus the margin of error (the lower and upper confidence bounds) contains the true value. In addition to sampling variability, the ACS estimates are subject to nonsampling error (for a discussion of nonsampling variability, see <a>Accuracy of the Data</a>).  The effect of nonsampling error is not represented in these tables.</div></div><div><br /></div><div><b>Data Processing Notes:</b></div><div><ul><li>This layer is updated automatically when the most current vintage of ACS data is released each year, usually in December. The layer always contains the latest available ACS 5-year estimates. It is updated annually within days of the Census Bureau's release schedule. <a>Click here</a> to learn more about ACS data releases.<br /></li><li>Boundaries come from the <a>US Census TIGER geodatabases,</a> specifically, the National Sub-State Geography Database (named tlgdb_(year)_a_us_substategeo.gdb). Boundaries are updated at the same time as the data updates (annually), and the boundary vintage appropriately matches the data vintage <a>as specified by the Census</a>. These are Census boundaries with water and/or coastlines erased for cartographic and mapping purposes. For census tracts, the water cutouts are derived from a subset of the <a>2020 Areal Hydrography boundaries offered by TIGER</a>. Water bodies and rivers which are 50 million square meters or larger (mid to large sized water bodies) are erased from the tract level boundaries, as well as additional important features. For state and county boundaries, the water and coastlines are derived from the coastlines of the 2022 500k <a>TIGER Cartographic Boundary Shapefiles</a>. These are erased to more accurately portray the coastlines and Great Lakes. The original AWATER and ALAND fields are still available as attributes within the data table (units are square meters).</li><li>The States layer contains 52 records - all US states, Washington D.C., and Puerto Rico</li><li>Census tracts with no population that occur in areas of water, such as oceans, are removed from this data service (Census Tracts beginning with 99).</li><li>Percentages and derived counts, and associated margins of error, are calculated values (that can be identified by the &quot;_calc_&quot; stub in the field name), and abide by the specifications <a>defined by the American Community Survey</a>.</li><li>Field alias names were created based on the Table Shells file available from the <a>American Community Survey Summary File Documentation page</a>.<br /></li><li>Negative values (e.g., -4444...) have been set to null, with the exception of -5555... which has been set to zero. These negative values exist in the raw API data to indicate the following situations:</li><ul><li>The margin of error column indicates that either no sample observations or too few sample observations were available to compute a standard error and thus the margin of error. A statistical test is not appropriate.</li><li>Either no sample observations or too few sample observations were available to compute an estimate, or a ratio of medians cannot be calculated because one or both of the median estimates falls in the lowest interval or upper interval of an open-ended distribution.<br /></li><li>The median falls in the lowest interval of an open-ended distribution, or in the upper interval of an open-ended distribution. A statistical test is not appropriate.</li><li>The estimate is controlled. A statistical test for sampling variability is not appropriate.<br /></li><li>The data for this geographic area cannot be displayed because the number of sample cases is too small.</li></ul></ul></div></div></div>

fields.name: OBJECTID
fields.alias: Object ID
fields.description: {"value":"An ObjectID is a unique, not null integer field used to uniquely identify rows in tables in a geographical table.", "fieldValueType":"uniqueIdentifier"}

fields.name: Shape__Area
fields.alias: Shape__Area

fields.name: Shape__Length
fields.alias: Shape__Length

fields.name: GEOID
fields.alias: Geographic Identifier - FIPS Code
fields.description: {"value":"Geographic Identifier, or GEOID is the numeric code used to uniquely identify all administrative/legal and statistical geographic areas for which the Census Bureau tabulates data.", "fieldValueType":"uniqueIdentifier"}

fields.name: ALAND
fields.alias: Area of Land (Square Meters)
fields.description: {"value":"Current area of land in square meters within this geographical area", "fieldValueType":"measurement"}

fields.name: AWATER
fields.alias: Area of Water (Square Meters)
fields.description: {"value":"Current area of water in square meters within this geographical area", "fieldValueType":"measurement"}

fields.name: NAME
fields.alias: Name
fields.description: {"value":"Name of this geographical area", "fieldValueType":"nameOrTitle"}

fields.name: State
fields.alias: State
fields.description: {"value":"State in which this geography resides", "fieldValueType":"nameOrTitle"}

fields.name: County
fields.alias: County
fields.description: {"value":"County in which this geography resides", "fieldValueType":"nameOrTitle"}

fields.name: B28001_001E
fields.alias: Total households
fields.description: {"value":"Total households (occupied housing units). A housing unit is classified as occupied if it is the current place of residence of the person or group of people living in it at the time of interview, or if the occupants are only temporarily absent from the residence for two months or less, that is, away on vacation or a business trip.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_001M
fields.alias: Total households - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for total households (occupied housing units) (90% confidence). A housing unit is classified as occupied if it is the current place of residence of the person or group of people living in it at the time of interview, or if the occupants are only temporarily absent from the residence for two months or less, that is, away on vacation or a business trip.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_002E
fields.alias: All Households that Have One or More Types of Computing Devices
fields.description: {"value":"All households that have one or more types of computing devices. Computing devices include a desktop or laptop, a smartphone, a tablet or other portable wireless computer, and some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_002M
fields.alias: All Households that Have One or More Types of Computing Devices - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for all households that have one or more types of computing devices (90% confidence). Computing devices include a desktop or laptop, a smartphone, a tablet or other portable wireless computer, and some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_003E
fields.alias: All Households that Have a Desktop or Laptop
fields.description: {"value":"All households that have a desktop or laptop. These households could also have a smartphone, a tablet or other portable wireless computer, and/or some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_003M
fields.alias: All Households that Have a Desktop or Laptop - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for all households that have a desktop or laptop (90% confidence). These households could also have a smartphone, a tablet or other portable wireless computer, and/or some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_004E
fields.alias: Households that have a Desktop or Laptop with No Other Type of Computing Device
fields.description: {"value":"Households that have a desktop or laptop only. These households do not have a smartphone, a tablet or other portable wireless computer, or some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_004M
fields.alias: Households that have a Desktop or Laptop with No Other Type of Computing Device - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for households that have a desktop or laptop only (90% confidence). These households do not have a smartphone, a tablet or other portable wireless computer, or some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_005E
fields.alias: All Households that Have a Smartphone
fields.description: {"value":"All households that have a smartphone. These households could also have a desktop or laptop, a tablet or other portable wireless computer, and/or some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_005M
fields.alias: All Households that Have a Smartphone - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for all households that have a smartphone (90% confidence). These households could also have a desktop or laptop, a tablet or other portable wireless computer, and/or some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_006E
fields.alias: Households that Have a Smartphone with No Other Type of Computing Device
fields.description: {"value":"Households that have a smartphone only. These households do not have a desktop or laptop, a tablet or other portable wireless computer, or some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_006M
fields.alias: Households that Have a Smartphone with No Other Type of Computing Device - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for households that have a smartphone only (90% confidence). These households do not have a desktop or laptop, a tablet or other portable wireless computer, or some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_007E
fields.alias: All Households that Have a Tablet or Other Portable Wireless Computer
fields.description: {"value":"All households that have a tablet or other portable wireless computer. These households could also have a desktop or laptop, a smartphone, and/or some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_007M
fields.alias: All Households that Have a Tablet or Other Portable Wireless Computer - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for all households that have a tablet or other portable wireless computer (90% confidence). These households could also have a desktop or laptop, a smartphone, and/or some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_008E
fields.alias: Households that Have a Tablet or Other Portable Wireless Computer with No Other Type of Computing Device
fields.description: {"value":"Households that have only a tablet or other portable wireless computer. These households do not have a desktop or laptop, a smartphone, or some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_008M
fields.alias: Households that Have a Tablet or Other Portable Wireless Computer with No Other Type of Computing Device - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for households that have only a tablet or other portable wireless computer (90% confidence). These households do not have a desktop or laptop, a smartphone, or some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_009E
fields.alias: All Households that Have an Other Computer
fields.description: {"value":"All households that have some other type of computer that is not classified as a desktop, laptop, smartphone, tablet/other portable wireless computer. These households could also have a desktop or laptop, a smartphone, and/or a tablet or other portable wireless computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_009M
fields.alias: All Households that Have an Other Computer - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for all households that have some other type of computer that is not classified as a desktop, laptop, smartphone, tablet/other portable wireless computer (90% confidence). These households could also have a desktop or laptop, a smartphone, and/or a tablet or other portable wireless computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_010E
fields.alias: Households that Have an Other Computer with No Other Type of Computing Device
fields.description: {"value":"Households that have only some other type of computer that is not classified as a desktop, laptop, smartphone, tablet/other portable wireless computer. These households do not have a desktop or laptop, a smartphone, or a tablet or other portable wireless computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_010M
fields.alias: Households that Have an Other Computer with No Other Type of Computing Device - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for households that have only some other type of computer that is not classified as a desktop, laptop, smartphone, tablet/other portable wireless computer (90% confidence). These households do not have a desktop or laptop, a smartphone, or a tablet or other portable wireless computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_011E
fields.alias: Households that Have No Computer
fields.description: {"value":"Households that have no computer or computing device. Computing devices include a desktop or laptop, a smartphone, a tablet or other portable wireless computer, and some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_011M
fields.alias: Households that Have No Computer - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for households that have no computer or computing device (90% confidence). Computing devices include a desktop or laptop, a smartphone, a tablet or other portable wireless computer, and some other type of computer.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28001_calc_pctNoCompE
fields.alias: Percent of Households that Have No Computer, Smartphone, or Tablet
fields.description: {"value":"Percent of households that have no computer or computing device. Computing devices include a desktop or laptop, a smartphone, a tablet or other portable wireless computer, and some other type of computer. Esri calculated field: round( 100.0 * B28001_011E / B28001_001E , 1)", "fieldValueType":"percentageOrRatio"}

fields.name: B28001_calc_pctNoCompM
fields.alias: Percent of Households that Have No Computer, Smartphone, or Tablet - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for percent of households that have no computer or computing device (90% confidence). Computing devices include a desktop or laptop, a smartphone, a tablet or other portable wireless computer, and some other type of computer. Esri calculated field: (100.0 * B28001_001E)*(sqrt((B28001_001M)^2-1.0*((B28001_011E / B28001_001E)^2)*(B28001_011M)^2))", "fieldValueType":"percentageOrRatio"}

fields.name: B28002_002E
fields.alias: All Households with an Internet Subscription
fields.description: {"value":"All households that have internet access by paying a cell phone company or internet service provider (ISP) for a subscription. This will normally refer to a service that someone is billed for directly for internet alone or sometimes as part of a bundle.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_002M
fields.alias: All Households with an Internet Subscription - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for all households that have internet access by paying a cell phone company or internet service provider (ISP) for a subscription (90% confidence). This will normally refer to a service that someone is billed for directly for internet alone or sometimes as part of a bundle.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_003E
fields.alias: Households with Dial-up with No Other Type of Internet Subscription
fields.description: {"value":"Households that have dial-up and no other type of internet subscription. Other types include a cellular data plan, broadband (such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL), satellite internet service, or other wireless subscription.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_003M
fields.alias: Households with Dial-up with No Other Type of Internet Subscription - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for households that have dial-up and no other type of internet subscription (90% confidence). Other types include a cellular data plan, broadband (such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL), satellite internet service, or other wireless subscription.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_004E
fields.alias: Households with Broadband of Any Type
fields.description: {"value":"Households that have broadband of any type. The category \"Broadband of any type\" refers to those who said \"Yes\" to at least one of the following types of Internet subscriptions: a cellular data plan for a smartphone or other mobile device; Broadband (high speed) such as cable, fiber optic, or DSL; satellite; or other wireless subscription; that is, everything except dial-up.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_004M
fields.alias: Households with Broadband of Any Type - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for households that have broadband of any type (90% confidence). The category \"Broadband of any type\" refers to those who said \"Yes\" to at least one of the following types of Internet subscriptions: a cellular data plan for a smartphone or other mobile device; Broadband (high speed) such as cable, fiber optic, or DSL; satellite; or other wireless subscription; that is, everything except dial-up.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_005E
fields.alias: All Households with Cellular Data Plan
fields.description: {"value":"All households that have a cellular data plan. These households could also have broadband (high speed) such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL; satellite internet service; dial-up; and/or other wireless service.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_005M
fields.alias: All Households with Cellular Data Plan - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for all households that have a cellular data plan (90% confidence). These households could also have broadband (high speed) such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL; satellite internet service; dial-up; and/or other wireless subscription.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_006E
fields.alias: Households with Cellular Data Plan with No Other Type of Internet Subscription
fields.description: {"value":"All households that have a cellular data plan and no other type of internet subscription. These households do not have broadband (high speed) such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL; satellite internet service; dial-up; or other wireless subscription.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_006M
fields.alias: Households with Cellular Data Plan with No Other Type of Internet Subscription - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for all households that have a cellular data plan and no other type of internet subscription (90% confidence). These households do not have broadband (high speed) such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL; satellite internet service; dial-up; or other wireless subscription.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_007E
fields.alias: All Households with Broadband such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL
fields.description: {"value":"All households that have broadband (high speed) such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL. These households could also have a cellular data plan; satellite internet service; dial-up; and/or other wireless subscription.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_007M
fields.alias: All Households with Broadband such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for all households that have broadband (high speed) such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL (90% confidence). These households could also have a cellular data plan; satellite internet service; dial-up; and/or other wireless subscription.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_008E
fields.alias: Households with Broadband such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL with No Other Type of Internet Subscription
fields.description: {"value":"All households that have broadband (high speed) such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL and no other type of internet subscription. These households do not have a cellular data plan; satellite internet service; dial-up; or other wireless subscription.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_008M
fields.alias: Households with Broadband such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL with No Other Type of Internet Subscription - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for all households that have broadband (high speed) such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL and no other type of internet subscription (90% confidence). These households do not have a cellular data plan; satellite internet service; dial-up; or other wireless subscription.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_009E
fields.alias: All Households with Satellite Internet Service
fields.description: {"value":"All households that have satellite internet service. These households could also have a cellular data plan; broadband (high speed) such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL; dial-up; and/or other wireless subscription.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_009M
fields.alias: All Households with Satellite Internet Service - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for all households that have satellite internet service (90% confidence). These households could also have a cellular data plan; broadband (high speed) such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL; dial-up; and/or other wireless subscription.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_010E
fields.alias: Households with Satellite Internet Service with No Other Type of Internet Subscription
fields.description: {"value":"All households that have satellite internet service and no other type of internet subscription. These households do not have a cellular data plan; broadband (high speed) such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL; dial-up; or other wireless subscription.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_010M
fields.alias: Households with Satellite Internet Service with No Other Type of Internet Subscription - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for all households that have satellite internet service and no other type of internet subscription (90% confidence). These households do not have a cellular data plan; broadband (high speed) such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL; dial-up; or other wireless subscription.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_011E
fields.alias: Households with Other Service with No Other Type of Internet Subscription
fields.description: {"value":"All households that have some other wireless subscription and no other type of internet subscription. These households do not have a cellular data plan; broadband (high speed) such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL; satellite internet service; or dial-up.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_011M
fields.alias: Households with Other Service with No Other Type of Internet Subscription - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for all households that have some other wireless subscription and no other type of internet subscription (90% confidence). These households do not have a cellular data plan; broadband (high speed) such as Cable, Fiber Optic or DSL; satellite internet service; or dial-up.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_012E
fields.alias: Households with Internet Access without a Subscription
fields.description: {"value":"Households that have internet access without paying a cell phone company or internet service provider (ISP) for a subscription. Some respondents may live in a city or town that provides free internet service for their residents. In addition, some colleges or universities provide internet service.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_012M
fields.alias: Households with Internet Access without a Subscription - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for households that have internet access without paying a cell phone company or internet service provider (ISP) for a subscription (90% confidence). Some respondents may live in a city or town that provides free internet service for their residents. In addition, some colleges or universities provide internet service.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_013E
fields.alias: Households with No Internet Access
fields.description: {"value":"No access to the Internet at this house, apartment, or mobile home. Includes housing units where no one can connect to or uses the internet using a paid service or any free service.", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_013M
fields.alias: Households with No Internet Access - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for households with no internet access (90% confidence). No access to the Internet at this house, apartment, or mobile home. Includes housing units where no one can connect to or uses the internet using a paid service or any free service", "fieldValueType":"countOrAmount"}

fields.name: B28002_calc_pctNoIntE
fields.alias: Percent of Households with No Internet Access
fields.description: {"value":"Percent of Households with No Internet Access. Includes housing units where no one can connect to or uses the internet using a paid service or any free service. Esri calculated field: round( 100.0 * B28002_013E / B28001_001E , 1)", "fieldValueType":"percentageOrRatio"}

fields.name: B28002_calc_pctNoIntM
fields.alias: Percent of Households with No Internet Access - Margin of Error
fields.description: {"value":"Use this value to add and subtract to get the upper and lower bounds for percent of households with no internet access (90% confidence). Includes housing units where no one can connect to or uses the internet using a paid service or any free service. Esri calculated field: (100.0 * B28001_001E)*(sqrt((B28002_013M)^2-1.0*((B28002_013E / B28001_001E)^2)*(B28001_001M)^2))", "fieldValueType":"percentageOrRatio"}
